items.title: OpenAI Signs Pentagon AI Deal
items.summary: OpenAI signs Pentagon AI deal for classified, cloud-only AI deployment with three redlines. Federal agencies move to phase out Anthropic over six months.

items.title: OpenAI Raises $110B in Funding Round Backed by Amazon and Nvidia
items.summary: OpenAI raises $110B from Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, reaching a $730B pre-money valuation and expanding AWS distribution and Nvidia infrastructure capacity.

items.title: OpenAI plans to almost double its headcount this year
items.summary: OpenAI plans to almost double its headcount by the end of 2026 to fend off competition from Anthropic and Google.

items.title: OpenAI is throwing everything into building a fully automated researcher
items.summary: OpenAI refocuses research efforts on building an AI researcher - a fully automated research system.

items.title: OpenAI Release Notes - March 2026
items.summary: Complete list of OpenAI latest updates for March 2026: GPT-5.4 launch (3 variants: Standard, Thinking, Pro).

items.title: OpenAI is shutting down its Sora video app
items.summary: OpenAI winding down Sora video generation app months after launch, signaling shift away from consumer creative tools.

items.title: OpenAI secures extra $10B in record funding round
items.summary: Fresh capital brings OpenAI's historic fundraise to $120B, exceeding initial target of $100B.

items.title: DeepSeek V3.2 正式版
items.summary: DeepSeek-V3.2首个将思考融入工具使用的模型，同时支持思考模式与非思考模式的工具调用。

items.title: DeepSeek API Platform
items.summary: DeepSeek API平台持续运营，提供模型API、开发者资源和文档。

items.title: March 2026 AI Roundup - MCP crosses 97M installs
items.summary: MCP (Model Context Protocol) crossed 97 million installs in March 2026, signaling permanent change in how AI agents are built.

items.title: NVIDIA GTC 2026 - Agentic AI Summit
items.summary: NVIDIA GTC 2026 ran March 10-14, reframing enterprise AI conversation around agentic deployments. Fortune 500 production agentic deployments confirmed.

items.title: Lumo-1: 端到端全身VLA模型
items.summary: 星尘智能发布Lumo-1，端到端全身VLA模型，超越了π0和π0.5，在具身智能领域取得突破。

items.title: Wayve Raises $1.2B Series D
items.summary: Self-driving startup Wayve secured $1.2B in Series D at $8.6B valuation, targeting London public robotaxi trials in 2026.

items.title: Mistral Small 4 launched March 3
items.summary: Mistral Small 4 launched March 3rd and immediately topped open-source reasoning benchmarks.

items.title: GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1, Grok 4.20 launched in 23-day window
items.summary: GPT-5.4 (3 variants), Gemini 3.1 Ultra, Grok 4.20, and Mistral Small 4 all launched in a 23-day window. Competitive gap compressed to weeks.

items.title: MCP Hits 97 Million Installs
items.summary: MCP crossed 97 million installs. Google Workspace CLI hit #1 on Hacker News. Agentic tooling moved from experimental to standard practice.

items.title: EU AI Act enforcement issued first formal inquiries
items.summary: EU AI Act enforcement issued first formal inquiries. Three US states passed AI transparency laws. UK AI Safety Institute published March model evaluations.

items.title: Anthropic computer use error rates reduced ~40%
items.summary: Updated computer use capabilities reduced error rates on desktop application interactions by ~40%. Claude API got new streaming and batching endpoints.

items.title: Google Acquires ProducerAI
items.summary: ProducerAI joins Google Labs as Google expands Lyria 3 music creation in Gemini, starting with 30-second tracks and SynthID watermarking.

items.title: Meta and AMD Sign $60B AI Infrastructure Deal
items.summary: Meta and AMD formalize $60B AI chip partnership tied to 6 gigawatt GPU rollout and expanded multivendor compute strategy.
